vocab.example: To be honest, I didn't enjoy long trips much because I was quite prone to motion sickness as a child.

vocab.meaning: tuyến đường có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: My father always preferred taking the scenic route, which made our family road trips much more memorable.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc cãi vã ở ghế sau (giữa trẻ con)
vocab.example: I have vivid memories of constant backseat squabbles with my brother over who got to sit by the window.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác bị gò bó, tù túng
vocab.example: Being stuck in a sedan for ten hours gave me a real sense of confinement that I found quite frustrating as an energetic kid.

vocab.meaning: những ký ức trân quý/đáng nhớ
vocab.example: The long drives to my grandparents' house are among my most cherished memories of childhood.
